# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Commands

```bash
npm run dev      # Start development server
npm run build    # Production build
npm run start    # Start production server
npm run lint     # Run ESLint
```

No test suite is configured.

## Architecture

**Next.js App Router** marketing site for Degen (an event discovery / social app). The codebase was originally generated by Locofy Lightning (design-to-code) and uses pixel-perfect absolute positioning throughout.

### Pages
- `/` — `src/app/page.tsx`: Landing page (client component). Orchestrates a multi-phase animation sequence: splash screen → carousel zoom → content fade-in. Uses `sessionStorage` to show the splash only on first visit per session.
- `/about` — `src/app/about/page.tsx`: Product feature page. Mostly static layout sections.

### Components (`src/components/`)
- **SplashScreen.tsx** — Framer Motion animated entry screen. Configurable via props (`fadeInMs`, `zoomMs`, `zoomScale`, `zoomOriginX/Y`). Emits `onDoneAction` callback on completion.
- **Header.tsx** — Fixed nav bar. Logo click scrolls to top when on home page, navigates to `/` otherwise.
- **Footer.tsx** — Accepts optional `className` prop. Instagram links to `@milinhchi`.

### Animation Patterns
Framer Motion is used for all animations. The home page choreography uses a chain of `setTimeout` calls keyed to these durations:
- Splash fade-out: ~1600ms total
- Carousel zoom: 3500ms (`[0.33, 0, 0.2, 1]` easing)
- Content fade-in: 3600ms delay
- Final "complete" state: 4200ms

### Styling
- **Tailwind CSS v4** (PostCSS plugin, not the CLI) with preflight disabled.
- Custom brand colors defined in `tailwind.config.js`: `DarkOrange` (`#fc750b`) is the primary CTA color.
- Custom fonts loaded via `@font-face` in `globals.css`: Brisbane (serif), Tomboy LP Bold, and Satoshi (Google Fonts).
- Font families accessed as `font-brisbane`, `font-satoshi`, `font-tomboy-lp-bold`.
- Path alias `@/*` resolves to `src/*`.

### External Integrations
- **Tally.so** — Lead-gen form embedded as an iframe in the home page. The Tally embed script is loaded in `src/app/layout.tsx`.

### Asset Organization
`public/` mirrors the section structure: `Header/`, `Footer/`, `Splash/`, `Carousel/`, `Discover Images/`, `About/`, `Info Sheet/`. High-res originals live in `source/` subdirectories alongside optimized SVGs.
